== Notes for [[Item:Q108511|Q108511]] ==


Sayyidna Abu Ali Hasan bin Ahmad bin Dawood bin Muhammad bin Maimoon bin Amr bin Abdullaah bin Sayyidna Muslim bin Sayyidna Aqeel bn Maulaana Imaam Abu Taalib was a great Daai of Maulaana Mehdi Billaah . He died on 14th of Rabi'ul Awwal 321 Hijri . Maulaana Imaam Qaaim bi Amrillaah prayed Salaatul janaaza on him . He was captured by Romans and was imprisoned for 7 long years . He was a prolific author of books of high repute . He wrote 1.Kitaab Shajaratul Burhaan. 2.Kitaab Alamn min al Haira and 3. Kitaab on the philosophy that Man was created via Rooh and Jism .

NOTES BY MULLA SA'DULLAAH HUSAMI -28th July 2015.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000018612834312

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
